results.title: HKSAR V. TSUI HOK TAK
results.coram: Before: Deputy District Judge N. Wong
results.charge: Offence: [1] and [3]  Theft (盜竊罪) [2]  Passing or tendering counterfeit notes (行使或付給偽製紙幣或硬幣)
results.representations: Present: Mr Alan M S Ng, Counsel on fiat, for HKSAR Mr Wong Yiu-fai, Kenneth instructed by Messrs. Chan & Tsu assigned by DLA, for the defendant

results.title: 香港特別行政區 訴 莫海洲
results.coram: 主審法官: 區域法院暫委法官鄭紀航
results.parties: 香港特別行政區 訴 莫海洲
results.charge: 控罪: [1] 行使或付給偽製流通紙幣（Passing or tendering counterfeit currency notes） [2] 保管或控制偽製流通紙幣（Having custody or control of counterfeit currency notes）
results.representations: 出席人士: 律政司檢控官吳彬倫律師，代表香港特別行政區 張偉顏大律師，由法律援助署委派的司徒維新律師行有限法律責任合夥延聘，代表被告
